name: Toast Integration (Custom)
description: Custom integration for Toast POS clients. No official WooCommerce plugin exists. Website serves as branding/SEO/marketing layer with links to Toast's ordering page. Menu display via Toast API if partner-approved.
condition: Only for clients using Toast POS. API is partner-gated — requires Toast integration partner approval for deeper access.

integration_approach.basic: WordPress site handles branding, menu display, gallery, reviews, SEO. 'Order Now' button links to client's order.toasttab.com page.
integration_approach.advanced: If partner API access granted, pull menu data from Toast menu API for styled display on WordPress. Ordering still redirects to Toast.
integration_approach.build_time: ~10-15 hours first build, reuse template after

config_notes: Most limited POS integration. Toast controls ordering UX. Your value is the branding, SEO, and marketing website — most Toast restaurants have terrible websites.
